purpose_context: Teams that ship a doctrine pack inside a larger repository cannot currently consume it from its git source, forcing manual clone workarounds. This mission adds first-class subdirectory support for git-sourced org packs, and bundles two doctrine-stack quality improvements: clear guidance on when ruamel.yaml versus PyYAML applies, and a canonical doctrine home for tiered (DDD-based) coding-standard rigour.
purpose_tldr: Let git-sourced doctrine packs live in a subdirectory, clarify YAML-library usage, and codify tiered coding standards in doctrine.
